👤 About Me

I'm Nishant More, an AI-powered Landing Page Designer and Web Builder with 3+ years of experience creating high-converting digital experiences.

I specialize in designing and building modern, performance-focused landing pages that combine clean visual design, user psychology, and conversion-driven strategy. My work focuses on helping startups, entrepreneurs, and growing businesses turn their ideas into polished digital products that attract users and drive measurable results.

Using modern web technologies and AI-assisted tools, I build websites and landing pages that are fast, scalable, and optimized for user engagement. My workflow focuses on understanding the user, mapping the user journey, and designing every interaction to maximize clarity and conversions.

I am passionate about AI-powered development, digital product design, and emerging web technologies, and I continuously improve my skills to deliver better results for clients and teams.

🚀 Core Projects

🤖 AutoDoc.AI

AI-powered documentation generator that automatically creates structured documentation from uploaded code or GitHub repositories.

The platform analyzes the code structure and generates readable documentation, helping developers understand projects faster and improving developer productivity.

🔧 FixBot

A digital service platform designed to connect users with service providers for common technical or repair-related tasks.

The platform focuses on a simple user experience and efficient service matching to streamline the process of finding and hiring local service providers.
